# ROSTER.md

## Team
Customer Success Team

## Objective
Maximize customer retention and lifetime value by guiding customers to success from day 1, monitoring health signals, and intervening proactively before churning happens.

## Members

| Agent | Role | Responsibility |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `onboarding-guide` | Onboarding Specialist | Runs structured onboarding journeys to get customers to first value quickly |
| `customer-success-manager` | CSM | Manages ongoing relationships, QBRs, and upsell opportunities |
| `nps-followup` | NPS Analyst | Processes NPS responses, closes the feedback loop, and escalates detractors |
| `churn-predictor` | Churn Predictor | Monitors usage signals and scores accounts by churn risk |

## Interaction Model

Onboarding activates вҶ’ CSM nurtures вҶ’ Churn Predictor flags risk вҶ’ NPS closes feedback loop.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Onboarding Guide  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ   Customer Success Manager в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ (onboarding-guide) в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ (customer-success-manager) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (days 1-30)       в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ  (ongoing relationship)    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                           в”Ӯ
                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                    v                                             v
          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ                   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
          в”Ӯ   Churn Predictor   в”Ӯ                   в”Ӯ   NPS Followup   в”Ӯ
          в”Ӯ  (churn-predictor)  в”Ӯ                   в”Ӯ  (nps-followup)  в”Ӯ
          в”Ӯ  (risk scoring)     в”Ӯ                   в”Ӯ  (feedback loop) в”Ӯ
          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## When to use
- You have a SaaS product and want to reduce churn systematically.
- Customer onboarding is inconsistent and time-to-value is too long.
- You send NPS surveys but don't have capacity to follow up on every response.

## Use Cases
- **New customer activation:** Onboarding runs checklist journey вҶ’ CSM schedules 30-day check-in.
- **At-risk account:** Churn Predictor flags low usage вҶ’ CSM does proactive outreach with success plan.
- **Detractor NPS:** NPS Followup logs score вҶ’ escalates to CSM вҶ’ CSM schedules recovery call.

## Rules
- Every new customer has an assigned onboarding checklist with a completion deadline.
- Accounts below health score threshold are escalated to CSM within 24h.
- All NPS detractors (0-6) receive a follow-up within 48h.
- CSM owns the account relationship вҖ” all team touchpoints are logged in CRM.

# ROSTER.md

## Team
Data Platform Team

## Objective
Deliver reliable, queryable, and visualized data to the business вҖ” from raw source ingestion to polished dashboards вҖ” using a stage-gated data pipeline.

## Members

| Agent | Role | Responsibility |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `data-engineer` | Data Engineer | Designs data architecture, manages warehouses, and ensures pipeline reliability |
| `etl-pipeline` | ETL Specialist | Builds extract-transform-load flows between source systems and the warehouse |
| `sql-assistant` | SQL Analyst | Writes, reviews, and optimizes analytical queries and data models |
| `dashboard-builder` | BI Developer | Builds dashboards, reports, and self-serve analytics for stakeholders |

## Interaction Model

Engineer designs вҶ’ ETL ingests вҶ’ SQL models вҶ’ Dashboard visualizes.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Data Engineer   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ  ETL Pipeline    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ (data-engineer)  в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ  (etl-pipeline)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (architecture)  в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ  (ingestion)     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                   в”Ӯ raw data
                                   v
                          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ  SQL Assistant   в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ (sql-assistant)  в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ  (modeling)      в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                   в”Ӯ clean models
                                   v
                          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ  Dashboard Builder   в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ (dashboard-builder)  в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ  (visualization)     в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## When to use
- You're building a new analytics stack or migrating from spreadsheets.
- Stakeholders need self-serve dashboards with reliable, fresh data.
- Existing data pipelines are brittle and need architectural review.

## Use Cases
- **New data source:** Engineer evaluates schema вҶ’ ETL builds connector вҶ’ SQL models the data вҶ’ Dashboard adds charts.
- **Dashboard refresh:** SQL rewrites stale queries вҶ’ Dashboard publishes updated views.
- **Pipeline failure:** Engineer diagnoses вҶ’ ETL reruns failed jobs вҶ’ SQL validates data integrity.

## Rules
- No raw data goes directly into dashboards вҖ” always goes through a SQL model layer.
- All ETL jobs have idempotency and retry logic.
- Schema changes require Data Engineer review before ETL runs.
- Dashboards include data freshness timestamps.

# ROSTER.md

## Team
Full-Stack Dev Team

## Objective
Deliver production-ready software features from requirements to deployment using a stage-gated pipeline. Each stage is owned by a specific team member and must pass before moving forward.

## Members

| Agent | Role | Responsibility |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `backend-engineer` | Lead Engineer | Writes, reviews, and refactors code; owns technical architecture decisions |
| `product-owner` | Product Owner | Writes specs and acceptance criteria; grooms backlog; signs off on deliverables |
| `platform-engineer` | Release Engineer | Manages CI/CD, infra provisioning, canary deployments, and rollbacks |

## Interaction Model

PO defines вҶ’ Dev implements вҶ’ SRE releases вҶ’ PO accepts.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Product Owner  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ  Backend Engineer    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ (product-owner) в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ (backend-engineer)   в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                     в”Ӯ PR merged
                                     v
                          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ  Platform Engineer   в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ (platform-engineer)  в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                     в”Ӯ deployed
                                     v
                          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                          в”Ӯ  Product Owner       в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ  (acceptance)        в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## When to use
- Building a new feature from scratch with clear ownership stages.
- Running a sprint where requirements, development, and ops are separate concerns.
- You need traceability from spec to production deploy.

## Use Cases
- **Feature sprint:** PO writes stories вҶ’ Dev implements вҶ’ SRE deploys to staging вҶ’ PO accepts вҶ’ SRE promotes to prod.
- **Bug fix:** Dev diagnoses and fixes вҶ’ SRE deploys hotfix вҶ’ PO confirms resolution.
- **Infra change:** SRE proposes вҶ’ Dev reviews impact вҶ’ SRE executes with PO sign-off.

## Rules
- No code ships without a passing CI run.
- PO acceptance is required before any production promotion.
- SRE is on-call for 24h after every deploy.
- Dev owns code reviewвҖ”no auto-merges without review.

# ROSTER.md

## Team
On-Call Team

## Objective
Detect, triage, and resolve production incidents automatically вҖ” escalating to humans only when necessary. This team runs 24/7 and follows a structured incident lifecycle to minimize MTTR.

## Members

| Agent | Role | Responsibility |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `incident-responder` | Incident Commander | Owns the incident lifecycle: declares, coordinates, delegates, and closes incidents |
| `flight-scraper` | Data Watchdog | Monitors external data sources, API health checks, and pipeline integrity |

## Interaction Model

Alert fires вҶ’ Incident Commander triages вҶ’ assigns tasks вҶ’ Watchdog verifies fix вҶ’ Commander closes.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Alert / PD   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ  Incident Commander  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (trigger)    в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ  (incident-responder)в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                   в”Ӯ
                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                    v                             v
          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
          в”Ӯ  Data Watchdog  в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ  Human Escalationв”Ӯ
          в”Ӯ  (flight-scraperв”Ӯ          в”Ӯ  (P0 only)       в”Ӯ
          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                   в”Ӯ
                   v
          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
          в”Ӯ  Verify + Close в”Ӯ
          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## When to use
- Your service runs in production and you need 24/7 automated first-response.
- You want to reduce alert fatigue by auto-resolving known failure patterns.
- You need structured RCA (root cause analysis) after every incident.

## Use Cases
- **API outage:** Watchdog detects high error rate вҶ’ Commander declares P1 вҶ’ auto-runbook executes вҶ’ verifies recovery.
- **Data pipeline stall:** Watchdog detects lag вҶ’ Commander escalates to data team вҶ’ monitors SLA.
- **False positive sweep:** Commander reviews alert history and suppresses noisy checks.

## Rules
- Every alert must be acknowledged within 5 minutes.
- P0 incidents always page a human in addition to automated response.
- Incidents cannot be closed without a verified health check passing.
- All actions are logged for post-incident review.

# ROSTER.md

## Team
Legal & Compliance Team

## Objective
Protect the business from legal and regulatory risk by reviewing contracts before they're signed, auditing ongoing compliance, maintaining privacy posture, and keeping a live risk register.

## Members

| Agent | Role | Responsibility |
|-------|------|----------------|
| `contract-reviewer` | Contract Reviewer | Reviews, redlines, and flags risky clauses in contracts before execution |
| `gdpr-auditor` | GDPR Auditor | Audits data processing, consent flows, and retention policies for regulatory compliance |
| `privacy-officer` | Privacy Officer | Owns privacy policies, DPAs, and processes data subject access/deletion requests |
| `risk-assessor` | Risk Assessor | Maintains the risk register and scores new operational or legal risks |

## Interaction Model

Risk Assessor evaluates вҶ’ Contract Reviewer gates signings вҶ’ Privacy Officer maintains policies вҶ’ GDPR Auditor continuously audits.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Risk Assessor  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ  Contract Reviewer   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ (risk-assessor) в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ (contract-reviewer)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ (risk scoring)  в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ (pre-signing review) в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
        в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ ongoing                   в”Ӯ policies needed
        v                           v
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  GDPR Auditor    в”Ӯ<в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ Privacy Officer  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (gdpr-auditor)  в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ(privacy-officer) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (audit cycle)   в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ (policy owner)   в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## When to use
- You're signing contracts with vendors, partners, or customers that need legal review.
- You need to demonstrate GDPR/CCPA compliance to customers or regulators.
- A new product feature involves data processing that requires a privacy assessment.

## Use Cases
- **Vendor contract:** Risk Assessor flags high-risk clauses вҶ’ Contract Reviewer redlines вҶ’ Privacy Officer checks DPA вҶ’ approved/rejected.
- **New feature launch:** Privacy Officer runs privacy impact assessment вҶ’ GDPR Auditor validates consent flows вҶ’ Risk Assessor scores residual risk.
- **Data breach:** Privacy Officer triggers breach protocol вҶ’ GDPR Auditor documents facts вҶ’ Risk Assessor updates register.

## Rules
- No contract is signed without Contract Reviewer sign-off.
- All new data processing activities require a Privacy Officer assessment.
- GDPR audit runs quarterly at minimum.
- Risk register is updated within 5 business days of any significant change.

## When to use
- You need SOC (Security Operations Center) coverage without a full human team.
- A CVE or threat alert requires coordinated investigation and response.
- You're running regular vulnerability assessments and need structured reporting.

## Use Cases
- **Active threat detected:** Monitor fires alert вҶ’ Scanner confirms affected surface вҶ’ Responder isolates вҶ’ Logger documents.


## CuГЎndo usarlo
- EstГЎs construyendo un nuevo stack de analytics o migrando desde planillas.

- NingГәn dato crudo va directamente a dashboards вҖ” siempre pasa por una capa de modelos SQL.
- Todos los jobs ETL tienen idempotencia y lГіgica de reintento.

- Los dashboards incluyen timestamps de frescura de datos.

## Reglas

# ROSTER.md

## Equipo
Equipo Legal y Compliance

## Objetivo
Garantizar que todos los contratos, flujos de datos y procesos internos cumplan con los marcos regulatorios aplicables (GDPR, privacidad, normativa sectorial), minimizando la exposiciГіn legal de la organizaciГіn.

## Miembros

| Agente | Rol | Responsabilidad |
|--------|-----|-----------------|
| `contract-reviewer` | Revisor de Contratos | Analiza y marca clГЎusulas problemГЎticas en contratos comerciales, de proveedores y de empleados |
| `gdpr-auditor` | Auditor GDPR | Audita el procesamiento de datos personales contra los requisitos del GDPR y emite informes |
| `privacy-officer` | Oficial de Privacidad | Gestiona las polГӯticas de privacidad, los avisos de cookies y las solicitudes de derechos de los titulares (DSAR) |
| `risk-assessor` | Evaluador de Riesgos | PuntГәa el riesgo legal en nuevas iniciativas, productos o relaciones con terceros |

## Modelo de InteracciГіn

Cada flujo comienza con una evaluaciГіn de riesgo вҶ’ el Revisor lee los contratos вҶ’ el Auditor GDPR verifica el cumplimiento normativo вҶ’ el Oficial de Privacidad mantiene las polГӯticas actualizadas.

```

   v                       v
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

                          в”Ӯ    Privacy Officer       в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ   (privacy-officer)      в”Ӯ
                          в”Ӯ  (polГӯticas + DSARs)     в”Ӯ
                          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## CuГЎndo usarlo
- NecesitГЎs revisar contratos con un tercero antes de firmar.
- Tu empresa procesa datos personales y necesita verificar el cumplimiento del GDPR.
- EstГЎs lanzando una nueva feature y querГ©s saber la exposiciГіn legal antes del release.

## Casos de Uso
- **RevisiГіn de contrato de proveedor:** El Evaluador de Riesgos puntГәa al proveedor вҶ’ el Revisor analiza el contrato вҶ’ el Oficial de Privacidad verifica las clГЎusulas de tratamiento de datos.
- **AuditorГӯa de privacidad:** El Auditor GDPR mapea los flujos de datos вҶ’ el Oficial de Privacidad actualiza los registros de actividades de tratamiento (RoPA).
- **Nueva feature con datos personales:** El Evaluador de Riesgos hace un DPIA вҶ’ el Auditor GDPR valida вҶ’ el Oficial de Privacidad actualiza la polГӯtica de privacidad.

## Reglas
- NingГәn contrato se firma sin revisiГіn del `contract-reviewer`.
- Las solicitudes de ejercicio de derechos (DSARs) se responden dentro de los 30 dГӯas legales.
- Todo nuevo procesamiento de datos personales requiere un DPIA si supera el umbral de riesgo.
- Los hallazgos de auditorГӯa se documentan y tienen un plazo de remediaciГіn definido.

## CuГЎndo usarlo

## Objetivo

## CuГЎndo usarlo

# ROSTER.md

## Equipo
Equipo de Producto

## Objetivo
Entregar valor continuo a los usuarios manteniendo un backlog priorizado, sprints ejecutados con precisiГіn y releases comunicadas claramente tanto interna como externamente.

## Miembros

| Agente | Rol | Responsabilidad |
|--------|-----|-----------------|
| `product-owner` | Product Owner | Define y prioriza el backlog, escribe user stories y mantiene la visiГіn del producto |
| `product-scrum` | Scrum Master | Facilita ceremonias, elimina impedimentos y mantiene la cadencia de sprints |
| `feature-request` | Gestor de Features | Procesa, clasifica y rankea los feature requests de clientes e internos |

- ArrancГЎs un ciclo de planificaciГіn de sprint o trimestral.

## Casos de Uso
- **Refinamiento de backlog:** El Gestor de Features consolida los requests вҶ’ el PO prioriza con criterios de negocio вҶ’ el Scrum Master lleva los Гӯtems al sprint.

## Reglas
- El PO es la Гәnica voz sobre prioridad вҖ” ninguna feature entra al sprint sin su aprobaciГіn.
- Cada sprint termina con release notes redactadas antes del deployment.
- Los feature requests sin propietario asignado se archivan despuГ©s de 90 dГӯas.
- El Scrum Master no toma partido en decisiones de producto вҖ” facilita, no bloquea.

# ROSTER.md

## Equipo
Equipo de Operaciones de Seguridad

## Objetivo
Detectar, investigar y responder a amenazas de seguridad y vulnerabilidades de forma continua вҖ” manteniendo los sistemas reforzados y los incidentes contenidos antes de que escalen.

## Miembros

| Agente | Rol | Responsabilidad |
|--------|-----|-----------------|
| `threat-monitor` | Analista de Amenazas | Monitorea logs, alertas y trГЎfico en busca de indicadores de compromiso |
| `vuln-scanner` | EscГЎner de Vulnerabilidades | Ejecuta scans automatizados y clasifica CVEs por explotabilidad e impacto |
| `incident-responder` | Comandante de Incidente | Coordina la respuesta, contenciГіn y recuperaciГіn ante incidentes de seguridad |
| `incident-logger` | Registrador de Evidencias | Documenta todos los hallazgos, lГӯneas de tiempo y decisiones para auditorГӯas y post-mortems |

## Modelo de InteracciГіn

Monitor detecta вҶ’ Scanner evalГәa el alcance вҶ’ Comandante coordina la respuesta вҶ’ Logger registra todo.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Threat Monitor     в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>в”Ӯ   Vuln Scanner       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (threat-monitor)    в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ  (vuln-scanner)      в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                         в”Ӯ alcance confirmado
                                         v
                              в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                              в”Ӯ   Incident Responder     в”Ӯ
                              в”Ӯ  (incident-responder)    в”Ӯ
                              в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                         в”Ӯ en curso
                                         v
                              в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                              в”Ӯ   Incident Logger    в”Ӯ
                              в”Ӯ  (incident-logger)   в”Ӯ
                              в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## CuГЎndo usarlo
- NecesitГЎs cobertura SOC sin un equipo humano completo.
- Una alerta de CVE o amenaza requiere investigaciГіn y respuesta coordinadas.
- EstГЎs corriendo evaluaciones de vulnerabilidades regulares y necesitГЎs informes estructurados.

## Casos de Uso
- **Amenaza activa detectada:** Monitor dispara alerta вҶ’ Scanner confirma superficie afectada вҶ’ Responder aГӯsla вҶ’ Logger documenta.
- **Sprint de CVEs:** Scanner identifica nuevos CVEs вҶ’ los clasifica вҶ’ Responder parchea en orden de prioridad вҶ’ Logger rastrea remediaciГіn.
- **RevisiГіn post-incidente:** Logger produce lГӯnea de tiempo completa para compliance o RCA.

## Reglas
- Toda alerta se trata como real hasta que se descarte.
- Ninguna acciГіn de contenciГіn se ejecuta sin registrar el motivo y el timestamp.
- Los incidentes P0 despiertan a un humano вҖ” sin remediaciГіn autГіnoma en producciГіn sin aprobaciГіn.
- Todos los resultados de scans se retienen por mГӯnimo 90 dГӯas.
